effective_at.description: The timestamp until when the quoted rate is valid.

base_amount.description: Amount in the lowest denomination of the `base_currency` to convert, often called the "sell" amount.

base_currency.description: Currency to convert, often called the "sell" currency.

internal_account_id.description: The ID for the `InternalAccount` this quote is associated with.

target_amount.description: Amount in the lowest denomination of the `target_currency`, often called the "buy" amount.

target_currency.description: Currency to convert the `base_currency` to, often called the "buy" currency.
